tasks.label: license-mcp: install
tasks.command: STATE_FILE="$HOME/.cache/license-mcp/installer-source"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$STATE_FILE")"; if command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Using pipx"; pipx install --force . && printf "pipx\n" > "$STATE_FILE"; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "pipx not found, using uv"; uv tool install --force . && printf "uv\n" > "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "Error: neither pipx nor uv is installed."; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: license-mcp: uninstall
tasks.command: STATE_FILE="$HOME/.cache/license-mcp/installer-source"; INSTALLER=""; if [ -f "$STATE_FILE" ]; then INSTALLER="$(tr -d ' \t\r\n' < "$STATE_FILE")"; fi; if [ "$INSTALLER" = "pipx" ]; then if ! command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Error: install was done with pipx, but pipx is not available."; exit 1; fi; pipx uninstall license-mcp-scanner && rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; elif [ "$INSTALLER" = "uv" ]; then if ! command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Error: install was done with uv, but uv is not available."; exit 1; fi; uv tool uninstall license-mcp-scanner && rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "No installer state found, trying available tools."; if command -v pipx >/dev/null 2>&1 && pipx uninstall license-mcp-scanner; then rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; elif command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv tool uninstall license-mcp-scanner; then rm -f "$STATE_FILE"; else echo "Error: package not found or neither pipx nor uv is installed."; exit 1; fi; fi

tasks.label: license-mcp: clean cache
tasks.command: CACHE_DIR="$HOME/.cache/license-mcp"; SCANS_DIR="$CACHE_DIR/scans"; if [ -d "$SCANS_DIR" ]; then rm -rf "$SCANS_DIR" && echo "Removed: $SCANS_DIR"; else echo "Nothing to clean: $SCANS_DIR not found"; fi; mkdir -p "$SCANS_DIR"
